note: Per-skill index: for each observed skill/ability, lists every talent that modifies it, where it sits in the tree, its parsed stat modification, and a mock value showing that modification applied to a normalized baseline of 10. Each modifying talent is tagged with one or more lanes from laneTaxonomy (DMG/CRIT/CDR/CAST/HASTE/SPEED/HEAL/SHIELD/MITIGATION/RESOURCE/COST/DURATION/AOE/CC/ARMOR/SUMMON/MISC), plus cross-cutting behavior flags (PROC, STACK) that describe how the effect triggers rather than what stat it touches. A handful of nodes have unresolved "$xx" template descriptions in the source export - these are flagged rather than guessed at.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Accelerate and Decelerate spells by 25%.

Accelerated Recovery.baseDescription: Accelerates the bodies natural healing process, healing the target for 60 + 115% healing over 15 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Fortify the current timeline, instantly healing all allies for 100 + 40% SP and extending the duration of Accelerated Recovery on them by 5 sec.
Increases the duration of your Accelerated Recovery by 6 sec and Decomposition by 3 sec.
Your Accelerated Recovery now applies to an additional nearby target.
Casting Fortify Timeline now extends the duration of Accelerated Recovery on all targets within 40 yds by an additional 10 sec.
When you cast Epoch you now also cast a Rank 1 Epoch on up to 5 allies affected by Accelerated Recovery.

Alter the fabric of time, healing an ally for 158 + 64% healing.

Your next Aeon used within 8 seconds will trigger with no cooldown or cost.
Activating Aeon spells now grants you 4% increased damage and healing for 20 seconds, stacking 3 times.
Activating an Aeon now increases your mana regeneration from Spirit by 100% for 8 seconds.

Guarantees healing done by Fabric of Time to critically strike and gives it an additional charge.Fabric of Time (Timeblender)2 Charges, 15 sec recharge
Alter the fabric of time, healing an ally for 529 + 64% healing.

Your next Aeon used within 8 seconds will trigger with no cooldown.
Increases the duration of effects applied by your Aeons by 8 sec.
Reduces the cooldown of your Aeons by -50%.

Ahead of the Game.baseDescription: Every 10th instance of your damage dealt or healing now gives you 60 increased spell power for 10 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description:
Periodic damage dealt now has a 15% chance to launch an Anomaly Spike at your target.
Anomaly SpikeDeals cond(gt(SPA, SPS), 161*1+SPA*0.25, 161*1+SPS*0.25) Chromatic Damage.

At the end of the duration of Clasp of Infinity, you launch an Anomaly Spike at affected enemies and their damage dealt is reduced by -10% for 4 seconds.Anomaly SpikeDeals cond(gt(SPA, SPS), 161*1+SPA*0.25, 161*1+SPS*0.25) Chromatic Damage.

Fling a shard of chaos at an enemy, dealing 209 + 150% SP Chromatic Damage, piercing immunities and resistances.

Dealing damage with Anomaly Spikes reduces the cast time of this ability by -10% for 30 seconds, stacking 10 times.
Damage dealt by Anomaly Spikes now also increases your damage and critical strike chance with Chromatic Shard by 6% per stack.
Your Chromatic Shard and Anomaly Spikes now deal an additional 20% their damage dealt as Chromatic Damage all nearby enemies.
Increases the chance to trigger Anomaly Spikes by 5% and their damage by 20%.

Periodic critical damage dealt now has a 20% chance to grant a Null Orb for 15 seconds.Null Orb (Proc)Increases the critical damage of Chromatic Shard and Anomaly Spikes based on your spell critical strike rating.

Critically striking with Chromatic Shard removes Null Orb.
Increases the damage of Wand of Time and Artificer's Wand by 20%.

Casting Artificers's Wand and Wand of Time now grants Discovery for 30 seconds, stacking 4 times. DiscoveryAt 3 stacks, your next Wand of Time or Artificer's Wand causes an additional 1 + 21.2% arcane SP + 25% Spirit + 10% ranged AP Arcane Damage, scaling with Spirit.
Reduces the cast time of Artificer's Wand by -0.2 sec.
Your Wand attacks now have a 30% chance to increase the damage of Artificer's Wand against the target by 3% for 15 seconds, stacking 10 times.
Casting Discordance now makes your next Artificer's Wand within 10 seconds instant cast and causes it to generate an additional Echo Fragment.
Casting Artificer's Wand or Crystal Cannon now has a 35% chance to reduce the cooldown of Hasten by -1 sec.

Continuum Spell
Artificer's Wand and Reverse Wound can be cast while moving for 5 seconds.

Duration increased by 5 sec per Echo Fragment.

Can only have 1 Continuum spell active at a time.

Casting Artificers's Wand and Wand of Time now grants Discovery for 30 seconds, stacking 4 times. DiscoveryAt 3 stacks, your next Wand of Time or Artificer's Wand causes an additional 1 + 21.2% arcane SP + 25% Spirit + 10% ranged AP Arcane Damage, scaling with Spirit.
Reduces the cast time of your Babify by 0.25 sec and its mana cost by -15%.

Instantly transform all enemies within 10 yds into a baby, preventing them from acting for 40 seconds, damage dealt will interrupt this effect. 

While babified, enemies will rapidly regenerate health. 

Scales with modifiers to Babify.
Casting Clasp of Infinity now reduces the cooldown of Backtrack by -10 sec.

Borrowed Time.baseDescription: Taking Physical damage now heals you equal to 10% of the damage dealt. Can only occur once per sec.

modifyingTalents.description: Damage dealt by Anomaly Spikes now also increases your damage and critical strike chance with Chromatic Shard by 6% per stack.
Damage dealt by Chromatic Shard now increases the target's spell damage taken by 10% for 30 seconds.

Transform into an Incarnate of Chaos, instantly resetting the cooldown of Chromatic Shard and causing your next cast to not incur a cooldown.

In addition, your damage dealt is increased by 15% for 15 seconds.
Increases the critical damage of Discordance and Chromatic Shard by 50%.
Increases the damage of Chromatic Shard, Melt Reality and Unmake by 15% against slowed enemies.
While Incarnation of Chaos is active, you may now cast Chromatic Shard while moving, but the duration of Incarnation of Chaos is reduced by -3 sec.

While Incarnation of Chaos is active, all damage dealt now has a 10% chance to lock yourself in a time loop for 3 seconds, making you unable to cast any spells other than Chromatic Shard.

While active, you cast Chromatic Shard free of cost, repeating every 1 sec.
Your Chromatic Shard and Anomaly Spikes now deal an additional 20% their damage dealt as Chromatic Damage all nearby enemies.
Your Chromatic Shard now has a 25% chance to strike again and incur no cooldown.

Periodic critical damage dealt now has a 20% chance to grant a Null Orb for 15 seconds.Null Orb (Proc)Increases the critical damage of Chromatic Shard and Anomaly Spikes based on your spell critical strike rating.

Critically striking with Chromatic Shard removes Null Orb.
Your Discordances used with Chronological are now guaranteed to critically strike.
Chronostasis now slows your target's movement speed by an additional -10%.

Clasp of Infinity.baseDescription: Conjure a magical binding upon an enemy that bounces to nearby enemies, rooting them in place for 4 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Casting Clasp of Infinity now reduces the cooldown of Backtrack by -10 sec.
Your Clasp of Infinity now increases your damage dealt to the target by 15%.

At the end of the duration of Clasp of Infinity, you launch an Anomaly Spike at affected enemies and their damage dealt is reduced by -10% for 4 seconds.Anomaly SpikeDeals cond(gt(SPA, SPS), 161*1+SPA*0.25, 161*1+SPS*0.25) Chromatic Damage.

Level 10 Passive
Wand of Time now generates an Echo Fragment, which can be used to unleash Distortion and Continuum spells.

Decomposition is now a Distortion spell, dealing increased damage based on how many Echo Fragments you have.

Continuum Spell
Empower your Wand attacks to deal an additional 50% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 2 + 25% SP + 12% ranged AP additional Arcane damage for 3 sec plus 5 sec per Echo Fragment.

Can only have 1 Continuum spell active at a time.
Your Shatter Echo now deals 20% additional damage while a Continuum spell is active.

Continuum Spell
Empower Wand attacks to affect up to 2 additional nearby enemies for 3 sec plus 5 sec per Echo Fragment. 

Affected attacks deal less damage per additional enemy hit.

Can only have 1 Continuum spell active at a time.

Continuum Spell
Generate 1 Echo Fragment every 3 sec for 5 seconds, plus an additional 5 sec per Echo Fragment consumed.

Can only have 1 Continuum spell active at a time.
Increases the duration of Continuum spells per Echo Fragment consumed by 0.5 sec.

Level 40 Passive
Casting Wand of Time now extends the duration of your Continuum spells by 3 sec.

Continuum spells cannot be extended beyond their maximum duration.

Continuum Spell
Artificer's Wand and Reverse Wound can be cast while moving for 5 seconds.

Duration increased by 5 sec per Echo Fragment.

Can only have 1 Continuum spell active at a time.

Continuum Restoration.baseDescription:
Restore the continuum at target location for all allies and enemies, removing all beneficial magic effects from enemies and harmful magic effects from allies.

This dispel is potent enough to remove magic effects that are normally undispellable

modifyingTalents.description:

Correct the Mistake.baseDescription: Retell the fate of party members within 30 yds, healing them for 91 + 68.57% healing.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Reverse Wound, Epoch, and Correct the Mistake by 15%.
Overhealing done by Correct the Mistake now applies a heal over time effect to the ally equal to 30% of the healing done over 5 seconds.
Casting Correct the Mistake now grants 2 stacks of Endless Sands.Endless SandsCast time of your next Reverse Wounds within 15 seconds is reduced by -20%, stacking up to 5 times.

Casting Fortify Timeline now grants you Converge the Infinite.Converge the InfiniteYour next Correct the Mistake has a 1 sec increased cast time, but heals for 30% more and is guaranteed to critically strike.

Successfully healing an ally in this way reduces the cooldown of Fortify Timeline by 8%.
Your Crystal Cannon now strikes 2 additional nearby enemies.
Casting Artificer's Wand or Crystal Cannon now has a 35% chance to reduce the cooldown of Hasten by -1 sec.

Wand of Time and Shatter Echo now have a 25% chance to unleash Crystal Cannon, launching 2 quick lesser Wand auto attacks at the enemy over 1 seconds, scaling with Spirit.

While Paradox Cannon is active, the chance to trigger this effect is increased by 10%.
Increases the effectiveness of your Accelerate and Decelerate spells by 25%.

Level 10 Passive
Wand of Time now generates an Echo Fragment, which can be used to unleash Distortion and Continuum spells.

Decomposition is now a Distortion spell, dealing increased damage based on how many Echo Fragments you have.
Increases the duration of your Accelerated Recovery by 6 sec and Decomposition by 3 sec.
Reduces the cooldown of Timerend by -2 sec and increases the duration of Decomposition by 3 sec.
Your Decomposition now applies Magic Erosion to the target, increasing attackers chance to hit the target with spells by 3% for 30 seconds.

Destabilize Time.baseDescription:
Reduces enemy casting speed by -10% for 20 seconds, increasing by -10% every time they cast.

Gaining stacks does not extend the duration of the spell.

Desynchronization.baseDescription:
Shift an enemy out of sync with the present, causing their grip to fail, disarming their melee and ranged weapons for 6 seconds.

Upon removal, they are resynced, preventing them from regenerating their health for 6 seconds.

Dimensional Divergence.baseDescription:
Swap places with a target.

If they're an enemy, you steal -80% of their movement speed for 3 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: While Hasten is active the cooldowns of Dimensional Divergence, Temporal Anomaly, and Temporal Focus are reduced by 10% every 2 sec.
Your Discordance now generates 1 Echo Fragment.

Level 30 Passive
Casting Discordance now unleashes the Crystal Cannon, launching 2 quick lesser Wand attacks at the enemy over 1 seconds, scaling with Spirit.
Casting Discordance now makes your next Artificer's Wand within 10 seconds instant cast and causes it to generate an additional Echo Fragment.
Every 20 sec, your next Discordance within 10 seconds is instant cast.
Your Discordance now strikes 3 additional enemies.
Increases the critical damage of Discordance and Chromatic Shard by 50%.
Your Discordances used with Chronological are now guaranteed to critically strike.
Your Discovery now also generates 3% of your base mana and health.

Displacement.baseDescription: Displaces a party or raid member and pulls them to you, dispelling root and snare effects from them.

Entropy Overload.baseDescription: Increases your chance to resist movement slowing effects by 20%.

Entropy Reversal.baseDescription: Reduces the duration of disease effects by -40%.

modifyingTalents.description:
Level 10 Passive
Teaches you Aeon of Resilience.Aeon of ResilienceReduces Epoch's cast time by -25% and it's mana cost by -10%, and healing done by it now reduces the target's damage taken by -5% for 6 seconds.
Casting Epoch now grants you Endless Sands.Endless SandsCast time of your next Reverse Wounds within 15 seconds is reduced by -20%, stacking up to 5 times.
Increases Epoch's cast time by 15%, healing done by 15%, and causes it to apply a damage absorption shield equal to 30% of the amount healed for 8 seconds.
Increases the critical strike chance of your Reverse Wound, Epoch, and Correct the Mistake by 15%.
Your critical strikes with Epoch now grant Cadence of Time, increasing the healing of Ripple by 10% for 15 seconds. Stacks 5 times.
Each stack of Sands of Time now also increases the healing of your Epoch by 10%.
Reduces Epoch's healing by -30%, but causes it to heal for an additional 50% of the amount healed over 3 seconds.

Healing done by your Epoch now increases the healing of Fabric of Time by 10% for 10 seconds, stacking 10 times.

Each stack gives you a 2% chance when you cast Fabric of Time to reset its own cooldown.

Increases Epoch's mana cost by 30%, critical strike chance by 10%, and healing done by 15%. 

In addition, healing with Epoch now increases the target's damage dealt by 3% for 15 seconds.
When you cast Epoch you now also cast a Rank 1 Epoch on up to 5 allies affected by Accelerated Recovery.

Erode Armaments.baseDescription: Your Wand attacks now reduce enemy attack power by 208 for 5 seconds.

Gift of the Infinite Dragonflight.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your spell damage by 40% of your Spirit and your spell hit rating by 3% of your Spirit.

Gravity Bomb.baseDescription:
Place a gravity bomb on the target. After 6 seconds they explode for 979 + 120% SP + 30% ranged AP Chromatic Damage in a 10 yds radius.

Directly before the explosion occurs, all enemies within 15 yds are teleported to the initial target.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Gravity Bomb by -30 sec, and its explosion occurs -3 sec faster.
Increases the damage dealt by Gravity Bomb by 50%.
Casting Artificer's Wand or Crystal Cannon now has a 35% chance to reduce the cooldown of Hasten by -1 sec.
While Hasten is active the ally now has a 25% chance when they deal damage to strike the target an additional time equal to 30% of the damage dealt.
Casting Hasten now also always reduces the cast time of your healing spells by an additional -20%.
While Hasten is active the cooldowns of Dimensional Divergence, Temporal Anomaly, and Temporal Focus are reduced by 10% every 2 sec.

Hourglass of Eternity.baseDescription: Periodic damage dealt now has a 5% chance to grant you 25% increased haste for 5 seconds.

Ideal Time.baseDescription: Every 30 sec, your next ability is guaranteed to critically strike.

Impeccable Timing.baseDescription: Your periodic damage and healing effects can now critically strike.

In addition, your damage dealt is increased by 15% for 15 seconds.

While Incarnation of Chaos is active, all damage dealt now has a 10% chance to lock yourself in a time loop for 3 seconds, making you unable to cast any spells other than Chromatic Shard.

While active, you cast Chromatic Shard free of cost, repeating every 1 sec.

While Incarnation of Chaos is active, your Melt Reality deals 30% increased damage and replicates an additional 20% 

In addition, periodic damage dealt now has a 5% chance to reduce the cooldown of Incarnation of Chaos by -1 sec.
Reduces the cooldown of Infinite Clone by -60 sec.

Infinite Power.baseDescription:
Level 10 Passive
Casting damaging spells now reduces your damaging spell cooldowns by 10% of their remaining cooldown.

Infinite Shield.baseDescription:
Shield an ally with 10 charges of Infinite Shield for 30 seconds. Each time they take damage, they will be healed for 190 + 25% SP and lose 1 charge.

Can only occur once per sec and can only affect 1 target at a time.

modifyingTalents.description: Removes the cooldown of Infinite Shield.

Infinity Stone.baseDescription:
Increases the critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, increases your critical strike chance by 3%.

Intuition.baseDescription:
Level 50 Passive
Increases your critical damage by 25%.

Luck.baseDescription: Allows 80% of your mana regeneration to continue while in combat.

Melt Reality.baseDescription:
Melt the target's reality, dealing cond(gt(SPFR, SPS), 48+0+SPFR*0.23, 48+0+SPS*0.23) Chromatic Damage every 3 sec for 30 seconds.

While active, periodic damage dealt to the target is replicated for 20% of the value to all enemies near them.

modifyingTalents.description: Damage dealt by Melt Reality now also reduces the target's primary attributes by -3% for 15 sec, stacking 5 times.

Level 30 Passive
Casting Waves of Time now grants you Warped Reality for 10 seconds.
Warped Reality (Proc)Allows you to cast Unmake and Melt Reality while moving for 10 seconds.
Increases the damage of Chromatic Shard, Melt Reality and Unmake by 15% against slowed enemies.
Casting Melt Reality now causes your next Unmake or Reverse Wound within 6 seconds to become instant and cost -50% less mana.
Casting Melt Reality now causes your Timerend and Unmake's periodic damage to benefit from haste for 10 seconds.
Increases the tick rate of Melt Reality by -25%.

While Incarnation of Chaos is active, your Melt Reality deals 30% increased damage and replicates an additional 20% 

In addition, periodic damage dealt now has a 5% chance to reduce the cooldown of Incarnation of Chaos by -1 sec.

Perfect Timing.baseDescription: Increases your haste by 8% and reduces your spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 70%.

Ripple.baseDescription:
Channel for up to 5 seconds. When the channel ends, if you channeled for at least 1.5 sec, allies within 40 yds are healed based on the duration of the channel.

While channeling, you are immune to stun effects.

modifyingTalents.description: Your critical strikes with Epoch now grant Cadence of Time, increasing the healing of Ripple by 10% for 15 seconds. Stacks 5 times.
Your damaging and healing critical strikes now reduce the remaining cooldown of Ripple by -1 sec.
Your Roll Back now removes 1 additional harmful effect.

Sands of Life.baseDescription: Increases your healing power by 50% of your Spirit.

modifyingTalents.description: Each stack of Sands of Time now also increases the healing of your Epoch by 10%.
Increases the damage and critical damage of your Shatter Echo by 30%.
Your Shatter Echo now deals 20% additional damage while a Continuum spell is active.
Critical strikes with Shatter Echo now increases the enemy's damage taken from you by 10% for 8 seconds.
Singularity Core now increases the damage of Shatter Echo while its active by 30% and allows Shatter Echo to trigger its damage.

Casting Shatter Echo now extends the duration of your Flux Emitter by 4 sec.

Cannot be extended beyond maximum duration.

Wand of Time and Shatter Echo now have a 25% chance to unleash Crystal Cannon, launching 2 quick lesser Wand auto attacks at the enemy over 1 seconds, scaling with Spirit.

While Paradox Cannon is active, the chance to trigger this effect is increased by 10%.

Shield of the Ages.baseDescription: When hit by a damaging critical strike, your damage taken is reduced by -3%, and healing received is increased by 5% for 3 seconds, stacking 3 times.

modifyingTalents.description: Singularity Core now increases the damage of Shatter Echo while its active by 30% and allows Shatter Echo to trigger its damage.

Slipstream.baseDescription:
Target an enemy and slip them into a pocket dimension for 5 seconds, banishing them and making them immune to damage.

Activate this ability again before the duration expires to choose a new location to place that enemy within 20 yds.

Temporal Anomaly.baseDescription: Augment reality for 10 seconds, causing 50% of the damage taken to be absorbed and converted into healing at the end of the duration.

modifyingTalents.description: While Hasten is active the cooldowns of Dimensional Divergence, Temporal Anomaly, and Temporal Focus are reduced by 10% every 2 sec.

Temporal Focus.baseDescription: You lock yourself into a perfect moment, removing and becoming immune to banish, silence, and interrupt effects for 10 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: While Hasten is active the cooldowns of Dimensional Divergence, Temporal Anomaly, and Temporal Focus are reduced by 10% every 2 sec.

Level 40 Passive
Increases the effectiveness of your Temporal Resilience, Temporal Swiftness, and Temporal Restoration spells by 100%.

Level 40 Passive
Increases the effectiveness of your Temporal Resilience, Temporal Swiftness, and Temporal Restoration spells by 100%.

Level 40 Passive
Increases the effectiveness of your Temporal Resilience, Temporal Swiftness, and Temporal Restoration spells by 100%.

The Vast Infinite.baseDescription:
All party and raid members become one, equally sharing 25% of all damage dealt to them for 10 seconds, up to a maximum of 100% of their total health.

At the end of the duration, all affected allies are healed equal to the total damage shared split evenly amongst all allies.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the channel time of your Time Out! by -40%.
Your Time Out! now regenerates -2% less mana per tick, but casting it now instantly restores 15% of your maximum mana.
Your Time Out! no longer breaks on damage, but now only reduces damage taken by 15%.

Timeguard.baseDescription: Place a magical guard on an ally for 2 minutes, causing the next 3 instances of direct damage that would reduce the target below 35% health to deal 40% less damage.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the effectiveness of Timeguard by 25%.
Reduces the cooldown of Timeguard by -30 sec.

Timemage.baseDescription: Reduces the duration of harmful magic effects on you by -30%.

modifyingTalents.description: Casting Melt Reality now causes your Timerend and Unmake's periodic damage to benefit from haste for 10 seconds.
Reduces the cooldown of Timerend by -2 sec and increases the duration of Decomposition by 3 sec.

Increases the all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, your Unmake and Timerend gain an additional 20% bonus spell scaling.
Using Unmake on an enemy affected by your Timerend now causes the enemy to erupt in a vortex of sand, dealing 81 Chromatic Damage every 1 sec to up to 8 enemies for 6 seconds in an 8 yd radius.

Transforms your Unmake into Artificer's Wand.Artificer's WandFocus to unleash 2 wand attacks dealing Ranged Weapon damage plus 5 over 1 seconds.

Generates 1 Echo Fragment.
Reduces the cast time of Unmake by -15% and reduces the mana cost of your instant spells by 10%.
Increases the critical strike chance of Unmake by 10%.

Level 30 Passive
Casting Waves of Time now grants you Warped Reality for 10 seconds.
Warped Reality (Proc)Allows you to cast Unmake and Melt Reality while moving for 10 seconds.
Increases the damage of Chromatic Shard, Melt Reality and Unmake by 15% against slowed enemies.
Casting Melt Reality now causes your next Unmake or Reverse Wound within 6 seconds to become instant and cost -50% less mana.
Casting Melt Reality now causes your Timerend and Unmake's periodic damage to benefit from haste for 10 seconds.

Increases the all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, your Unmake and Timerend gain an additional 20% bonus spell scaling.
Using Unmake on an enemy affected by your Timerend now causes the enemy to erupt in a vortex of sand, dealing 81 Chromatic Damage every 1 sec to up to 8 enemies for 6 seconds in an 8 yd radius.

Put all enemies and allies in an 8 yd radius in target area into a stasis, banishing them for 6 seconds, making them invulnerable to all effects but unable to move.

Casting Unmake on a target will remove this effect.

Unstable Chronoglass.baseDescription: Place an Unstable Chronoglass at target location for 30 seconds that will redirect the next 3 offensive enemy spell casts onto itself.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cooldown of Unstable Chronoglass by -30 sec.

Wand Expert.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your ranged attack power by 100% of your Spirit.

modifyingTalents.description:
Level 10 Passive
Wand of Time now generates an Echo Fragment, which can be used to unleash Distortion and Continuum spells.

Decomposition is now a Distortion spell, dealing increased damage based on how many Echo Fragments you have.
Increases the damage of Wand of Time and Artificer's Wand by 20%.

Casting Artificers's Wand and Wand of Time now grants Discovery for 30 seconds, stacking 4 times. DiscoveryAt 3 stacks, your next Wand of Time or Artificer's Wand causes an additional 1 + 21.2% arcane SP + 25% Spirit + 10% ranged AP Arcane Damage, scaling with Spirit.
Your Wand of Time now has a 40% chance to reset its own cooldown.

Level 40 Passive
Casting Wand of Time now extends the duration of your Continuum spells by 3 sec.

Continuum spells cannot be extended beyond their maximum duration.

Wand of Time and Shatter Echo now have a 25% chance to unleash Crystal Cannon, launching 2 quick lesser Wand auto attacks at the enemy over 1 seconds, scaling with Spirit.

While Paradox Cannon is active, the chance to trigger this effect is increased by 10%.
Transforms your Wand of Time into Timerend.TimerendRend the fabric of time, dealing 36 Chromatic Damage over 6 seconds.

Level 30 Passive
Casting Waves of Time now grants you Warped Reality for 10 seconds.
Warped Reality (Proc)Allows you to cast Unmake and Melt Reality while moving for 10 seconds.

Warpstriker.baseDescription: Reduces the cost of your spells by -10% and the chance for your spells to be dispelled by 20%.

Waves of Time.baseDescription:
Blast enemies in a frontal cone with time fractals, knocking them back slightly.

The knockback repeats 1 additional time after 2 sec.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cooldown of Waves of Time by -4 sec.

Level 30 Passive
Casting Waves of Time now grants you Warped Reality for 10 seconds.
Warped Reality (Proc)Allows you to cast Unmake and Melt Reality while moving for 10 seconds.
Increases the effectiveness of your Wisdom spells by 20%.
